tools.name: search_korean_products
tools.description: Search Korean products including K-beauty, K-food, and K-pop merch categories. English JSON.

tools.name: get_kbeauty_ingredients
tools.description: Lookup MFDS cosmetics ingredient source mapping for K-beauty sellers. Official-source mapping only, not legal advice or import clearance.

tools.name: get_korea_trends
tools.description: Get Korean (Naver) search trend indices for a keyword — viral detection for K-beauty/K-food.

tools.name: get_korea_real_estate
tools.description: Get Korean apartment transaction records (MOLIT) in English.

tools.name: get_korean_company_filings
tools.description: Get Korean company profiles and filings (DART) in English.

tools.name: get_korean_stock_overview
tools.description: Get Korean stock market overview rows.

tools.name: get_korean_stock_prices
tools.description: Get Korean stock OHLCV and traded value.

tools.name: get_korean_stock_fundamentals
tools.description: Get Korean stock fundamentals and valuation ratios.

tools.name: get_korean_stock_disclosures
tools.description: Get Korean DART equity disclosures summarized in English.

tools.name: get_korean_stock_flows
tools.description: Get Korean investor flow, program trading, short, and lending data.

tools.name: get_korean_stock_screeners
tools.description: Get derived Korean equity screening signals.

tools.name: get_korea_fx_macro
tools.description: Get Korea FX rates and macro indicators.

tools.name: get_korea_tourism
tools.description: Get Korean tourism places and attractions in English.

tools.name: get_korea_weather
tools.description: Get Korean weather conditions and forecasts.

tools.name: build_korea_seller_signal_pack
tools.description: Build a seller-ready Korea sourcing signal pack with product candidates, trend signal, demand board summary, close path, and legal guardrails. No payment collection or private endpoint bypass.

tools.name: build_sourcing_pack_report
tools.description: Build a seller-facing sourcing pack report with market validation, Korea source-backed price context, target-market competition checks, listing export handoff, risk notes, and paid report path. No checkout, physical purchase, shipping, or profit guarantee.

tools.name: build_cash_sprint_packet
tools.description: Build an operator-confirmed cash sprint packet with target revenue math, buyer segment queues, close scripts, proof links, and guardrails. No sending, invoicing, or payment collection.

tools.name: build_compliance_scout_sample
tools.description: Build a buyer-ready MFDS K-beauty ingredient source-map sample for Compliance Scout. Official-source mapping only; not legal advice, import clearance, sending, invoicing, or payment collection.

tools.name: build_buyer_discovery_queue
tools.description: Build an operator-confirmed buyer discovery queue with public search links, qualification rules, proof assets, and guardrails. No scraping, sending, posting, invoicing, or payment collection.

tools.name: build_invoice_draft_packet
tools.description: Build an operator-confirmed draft invoice packet with line items, buyer wording, payment-method placeholders, and operator checks. Draft only; no invoice issued, payment link generated, sending, or collection.

tools.name: build_delivery_pack
tools.description: Build an operator-confirmed paid delivery scope pack with deliverables, acceptance criteria, QA checklist, buyer wording, proof links, and guardrails. Does not start delivery, send files, invoice, or collect payment.

tools.name: build_freelance_listing_pack
tools.description: Build operator-confirmed Upwork/Fiverr/Contra/LinkedIn/Reddit listing copy, price tiers, buyer requirements, proposal templates, proof links, and guardrails. Does not create accounts, post, submit proposals, DM, email, invoice, or collect payment.

tools.name: build_operator_commercial_playbook
tools.description: Build the commercial operator playbook: what to deploy, where to list, what the user must do, offer stack, proof links, and guardrails. Does not post, submit, DM, invoice, collect payment, change accounts, or activate Paddle.

tools.name: build_mcp_competitor_benchmark
tools.description: Build a benchmark packet comparing overseas ecommerce/seller MCP patterns against K-Data Gate positioning. It returns patterns to copy, gaps to own, listing copy, proof links, source notes, and guardrails. Does not submit to hubs, scrape, invoice, collect payment, or activate Paddle.

tools.name: create_direct_buy_ship_order
tools.description: Compatibility tool: create a manual Korean buy/shipping exception request for an overseas seller. K-Data Gate is primarily sourcing intelligence and listing automation. This records product, quantity, destination address, and seller responsibility consent. It does not collect money or trigger Korean

tools.name: create_buy_ship_cart_order
tools.description: Compatibility tool: create a multi-item manual Korean buy/shipping exception request for an overseas seller or seller agent. This is not the main product flow. It records bundled products, quantities, destination address, and seller responsibility consent. It does not collect money or trigger Korean

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: build_operator_commercial_playbook · Private data: get_korea_real_estate, build_korea_seller_signal_pack, build_delivery_pack, create_direct_buy_ship_order, create_buy_ship_cart_order · Public sink: build_delivery_pack, build_freelance_listing_pack, build_operator_commercial_playbook, build_mcp_competitor_benchmark.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: build_operator_commercial_playbook · Private data: get_korea_real_estate, build_korea_seller_signal_pack, build_delivery_pack, create_direct_buy_ship_order, create_buy_ship_cart_order · Public sink: build_delivery_pack, build_freelance_listing_pack, build_operator_commercial_playbook, build_mcp_competitor_benchmark

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
